benefits.description: Game changer for acid reflux and IBS symptoms; able to discontinue all acid reducer medications and prescription acid blockers; can eat any food without GI repercussions; resolved reflux, bloating, and pain associated with IBS

protocol_notes: User was diagnosed with IBS-M as teenager and had tried multiple prescription acid blockers and OTC medications before starting oral BPC-157. Tried subcutaneous BPC-157 alone first with zero gut benefits. Currently using 500mcg oral tablet in morning only. Has struggled with GI issues throughout life and has had extensive testing.
